plot outline: Mick Haller is a defense lawyer who works out of his Lincoln. When a wealthy Realtor is accused of assaulting a prostitute, Haller is asked to defend him. The man claims that the woman is trying to get some money out of him. But when Haller looks at the evidence against him, he learns that this case might be linked to an old case of his.
title: The Lincoln Lawyer

distributors.name: Walt Disney Studios Motion Pictures Germany

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
